summary: Good‑quality recording of a jam‑heavy show with standout Althea, Uncle John’s Band and High Time, though some fans note the set was uneven.
review: Listeners rave about the extended jams – especially the sweet ending to Althea and an inspired run through Uncle John’s Band and High Time – and praise Jerry’s soaring guitar work. Recording details are scarce, but no major technical complaints surface, suggesting a listenable source despite uncertainty about its exact origin.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show highly (4‑5 stars) and highlight strong jams, while a few note mediocrity or possible confusion about the venue; recording quality is not explicitly discussed, keeping the overall confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on clarity, mix, or source type; reviewers did not report major audio problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as very jammy with strong highlights, though a few listeners felt parts of the show were mediocre or uneven.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for shining guitar work and “magic” that had the audience gasping.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboardist) is noted as shining on the night.
